prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `58c02a16`.
codex_response:
Implemented `58c02a16` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: take the true seed from the upper-left area before the solid secondary-color border row/column, build a self-similar macro-tile where seed foreground cells select the original seed and seed-`7` cells select the seed recolored to the border color, then repeat that macro-tile periodically over the full grid. I discarded the summary hints as exact guidance and recorded the mismatch in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_58c02a16/notes.md#L1); the key corrections are that the full bordered motif is not the repeated unit, and the recoloring direction is primary-to-secondary, not the reverse.

Core files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_58c02a16/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_58c02a16/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_58c02a16/generator.py#L14). The generator matches the family by keeping the motif flush to the top-left, using only two non-background colors plus `7`, sampling seed sizes in the observed range, using a solid border row/column, and choosing output sizes as one macro-tile plus an optional cropped repeat. No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed end to end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the artifacts were produced at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/58c02a16/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/58c02a16/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/58c02a16/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/58c02a16/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/58c02a16/previews/preview_03.png).
